tree.name: Kobe Sanders
tree.tradeDescription: Traded from Knicks for Mohamed Diawara and Luka Mitrovic

assetsGivenUp.name: Mohamed Diawara

assetsGivenUp.name: Luka Mitrovic
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Clippers acquired draft rights to Luka Mitrovic from Kings for Filip Petrušev

assetsGivenUp.name: Filip Petrušev
